channel.title: dotfiles on Fundor333
channel.description: Recent content in dotfiles on Fundor333

item.title: Dotfiles, bot and yaml files
item.description: If you ever use Unix based system you are familiar with dotfiles for configuration. Any program has some of this file or folders laying arrount in your user root. And many time it was a booring job to setup all your stuff before starting with all the work because I want the config to be the same every where I work. So, in the end of the 2017 i find an article about dotfiles: Managing your Dotfiles.
